scope_note: QA Langlands GL6 Exterior Square cert [406]. Primary sources: Kim, H.H. and Shahidi, F. (2002) 'Functorial products for GL_2 x GL_3 and the symmetric cube for GL_2' Annals of Mathematics 155 pp.837-893 doi:10.4007/annals.2002.155.837 (exterior square transfer GL_4 to GL_6); Cogdell, J. (2004) 'L-functions and Converse Theorems for GL_n' in Automorphic Forms and the Langlands Program, AMS ISBN 978-0-8218-3516-0 (exterior square L-functions); Arthur, J. and Clozel, L. (1989) ISBN 978-0-691-08517-3 (automorphic induction, source of the GL_4). CLAIM (narrow and falsifiable): For f=2.2.5.1-125.1-a and split prime p≡1(mod5), the full exterior square GL_6 Euler polynomial of AI_{Q(sqrt5)/Q}(f) is: W_p(Y) = 1-(N+2p)*Y+p(T^2-p)*Y^2-2p^2(T^2-N-2p)*Y^3+p^3(T^2-p)*Y^4-p^4(N+2p)*Y^5+p^6*Y^6 where T=2u+v and N=u^2+uv-v^2. Four checks: (C1) all 7 coefficients in Z for all 22 split primes p<=500; (C2) weight-2 palindrome a5=p^4*a1, a4=p^2*a2, a6=p^6; (C3) middle coefficient a3=-2p^2*(T^2-N-2p) divisible by 2p^2 (double multiplicity from ∧^2 decomposition); (C4) consistency: W_p = (1-pY)^2 * R_p(Y) where R_p is from cert [405]. Decomposition: ∧^2(AI)=det(pi_1)+pi_1⊗pi_2+det(pi_2) => (1-pZ)^2 * R_p(Z). Theorem NT: float embeddings are observer projections; all integer arithmetic is in Z. Derived 2026-06-13.
